scripts.check: npm run build && node --check "dist/TORN'z Tools.user.js" && node --check "dist/chrome-extension/content/tornz-tools.js" && node --check "dist/chrome-extension/background.js" && node --check "dist/chrome-extension/content/gm-polyfill.js" && node --check "dist/chrome-extension/content/crimes-data-bridge.js" && node -e "JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('dist/chrome-extension/manifest.json', 'utf8')); console.log('manifest ok')"
